settingsMain.pageSubtitle: Global configuration for the academic year and application rules.

general.label: General
general.description: Application name, theme colors, logo, and global configuration.

landing.label: Landing Page
landing.description: Title, description, and visual elements of the public page.

security.label: Security
security.description: Session timeout and Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) enforcement.

smtp.label: SMTP (Email)
smtp.description: Email server, templates, and automatic notification matrix.

guide.label: Guide
guide.description: Incident reporting guide content per role (Markdown).

help.label: Help Center
help.description: Help Center content per role (Markdown) — shown in the Help menu for all users.

ai_assistant.label: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: LLM configuration (NVIDIA NIM / Ollama): enabled, base URL, model, API key (encrypted), system prompt.

academic.label: Academic
academic.description: Academic year, semester, and academic policies.

assessment.label: Assessment
assessment.description: Grade component weights (Logbook/Mini-CEX/DOPS/CBD) and letter grade ranges.

clinical.label: Clinical & Logbook
clinical.description: Submission limits and auto-verification of clinical logbooks.

attendance.label: Attendance
attendance.description: GPS geofence, default radius, lateness threshold, and anomaly detection.

finance.label: Finance
finance.description: Honorarium rates and hospital billing cycle.

settingsMain.saveSuccess: Settings saved successfully. Changes may require a refresh to fully take effect.
settingsMain.aiModelPlaceholder: or paste the exact model id from build.nvidia.com
settingsMain.secretSavedHint: ✓ Key saved & encrypted. Leave blank to keep it, or type to replace.
settingsMain.secretHint: Stored encrypted on the server; never shown back to the browser.
settingsMain.guideStep1: 1. Check the events that should trigger automatic emails.
settingsMain.guideBullet1: Send to Role — every user with that role (e.g. all "Kaprodi").
settingsMain.guideBullet2: Manual Email (CC) — specific email addresses outside roles (e.g. committee/task force).
settingsMain.guideNote: For notifications addressed to the reporter/requester (e.g. "Status Updated", "Consultation Responded"), that person already receives them automatically — recipients listed here are additional.
settingsMain.roleHelp: All users with this role will receive the email. Separate multiple roles with commas. Write the role name exactly (see the Access Control/RBAC page).
settingsMain.ccHelp: Specific email addresses (optional). Separate with commas. May be left empty.
settingsMain.condHelp: Add extra recipients only if a field has a certain value. Example: CC satgas@acms.edu only when {field} = bullying.
settingsMain.condNoField: (This event does not provide any field to check yet.)
settingsMain.condSkip: Skip this section if not needed.
settingsMain.additionalCc: Additional CC Email (when the condition is met)
settingsMain.inactiveTitle: This setting is stored but its feature is not yet enforced by the system.
settingsMain.accessDeniedDesc: You do not have permission to access the System Settings page.

settingsRoles.metaDescription: Manage each role's access to application modules
settingsRoles.loadError: Failed to load roles & permissions data
settingsRoles.title: Module Access Management (RBAC)
settingsRoles.subtitle: Check the modules to enable for each Role. These settings immediately change the menus shown on the *client* side and API access on the *server*.
settingsRoles.focusSuffix: — focused on the module currently being worked on

settingsReferences.metaDescription: Manage system reference data for all ACMS modules
settingsReferences.pageSubtitle: Configure all dropdown values and master data used by the various modules in ACMS.
settingsReferences.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this reference?
settingsReferences.dialogDesc: Fill in the form below to manage system references.
settingsReferences.categoryHelp: Reference group (must be the same for items of the same kind).
settingsReferences.nameHelp: The text shown to the *User* in the *Dropdown*.
settingsReferences.valueHelp: Unique value processed in the *database* (no spaces, use *underscores*).
settingsReferences.activeHelp: Can this reference be selected by the *User*?

settingsAuditLogs.metaDescription: Immutable audit trail of all important ACMS system activities
settingsAuditLogs.title: Audit Trail
settingsAuditLogs.subtitle: Immutable (append-only) records with a tamper-proof hash chain for every important action: grade changes, logbook verification, rotation assignments, and financial operations. Super Admin sees all programs; Kaprodi only their own program.
settingsAuditLogs.forbidden: You do not have permission to view the audit trail.
settingsAuditLogs.loadError: Failed to load the audit trail.

settingsUsers.pageSubtitle: Manage Students, Preceptors (Dodiknis), and System Admins.
settingsUsers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
settingsUsers.listDesc: Manage system user access and data.
settingsUsers.dialogDesc: Fill in the user data and assign the appropriate role.
settingsUsers.deactivateMsg: will not be able to log in until reactivated. Their data & history remain intact.
settingsUsers.activateMsg: will be able to log in again with the same account.
settingsUsers.importDesc: All rows will be given the selected role. Required columns: nama, email (the password & nim columns are optional — a blank password is generated automatically and sent via email). Download template
settingsUsers.importStudentNote: For students, use the Students menu → Import Excel (creates the academic profile as well).

settingsAi.superAdminOnly: This feature is for Super Admin only.
settingsAi.chatError: Failed to reach the AI Assistant.
settingsAi.title: AI Assistant
settingsAi.notConfiguredWarning: The AI Assistant is not enabled/configured yet. Open Settings → AI Assistant to enable it and enter the API key.
settingsAi.emptyHint: Ask about the system state based on real data, or ask for help drafting documents.
settingsAi.inputPlaceholder: Type a message… (Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line)

incidents.label: Unhandled incidents
incidents.prompt: How many incident reports are still in submitted and investigating status?

students.label: Student list
students.prompt: Show the list of students with their study program and status.

summary.label: System summary
summary.prompt: Give a summary of the system's core entity counts (students, hospitals, programs, rotations, exams).

memo.label: Meeting memo draft
memo.prompt: Help me draft a memo inviting people to next week's clinical rotation coordination meeting.
